title: Early Bird Brief
description: The Early Bird Brief is a daily roundup of military and defense news stories from around the globe curated by Military Times and Defense News.
text:
Welcome to the Early Bird Brief, our morning round-up of the day's most important military and defense-industry stories, compiled by Jonathan Lehrfeld. Please send news tips and suggestions to earlybird@militarytimes.com.
We generally post the EBB by 7 a.m. ET every weekday. You can return here to read it—or you can subscribe to get it sent directly in your inbox.
